# atlassian_confluence_space (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Confluence Cloud space by key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_confluence_space" "example" {
  key = "EXAMPLE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The space key to look up (e.g. MYSPACE).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The plain-text description of the space.
- `id` (String) The numeric ID of the space.
- `name` (String) The display name of the space.
